---
title: "Control Flow"
format: 
  revealjs:
      theme: [simple, style.scss]
      auto-stretch: false
editor: source
---

<!-- [20 minutes] Activity: Give half the students one prompt and half another -- sketch diagram and trade for coding/implementation -->

<!-- [20 minutes] Activity: Give half the students one prompt and half another -- sketch diagram and trade for coding/implementation -->

<!-- Something like FizzBuzz -->

<!-- - dim -->
<!-- - nrow -->
<!-- - ncol -->
<!-- _ $ to grab columns -->
<!-- - [] to grab elements -->


<!-- base <- "" -->
<!-- counter <- 0 -->
<!-- while (base != "chai") { -->
<!--   counter <- counter + 1 -->
<!--   base <- coffee_orders$Base[counter] -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- for(i in 1:num_orders){ -->
<!--   if (coffee_orders$Base[i] == "espresso") { -->
<!--     num_espresso <- num_espresso + 1 -->
<!--   } -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- ice <- 0 -->
<!-- for (i in 1:num_orders) { -->
<!--   if (coffee_orders$Temperature[i] == "iced") { -->
<!--     if (coffee_orders$Size[i] == "medium") { -->
<!--       ice <- ice + 4 -->
<!--     } -->
<!--     else { -->
<!--       ice <- ice + 6 -->
<!--     } -->
<!--   } -->
<!-- } -->
